claimText: The Genome India Project was initiated by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) to map the genetic diversity of India.
evidenceExcerpt: GenomeIndia Project was initiated by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT) to map India's genetic diversity.
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal agency for the Genome India Project.
distractorHooks: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)

claimText: The Indian Biological Data Centre (IBDC) located at Faridabad is India's first national life science data repository.
evidenceExcerpt: Data is stored at the Indian Biological Data Centre (IBDC) at Faridabad, India's first national life science data repository.
examUse: Fact-based location or 'first of its kind' statement question.
distractorHooks: It is a private data repository
It is India's second life science repository

claimText: The IndiGen program is a genome sequencing initiative launched by the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR).
evidenceExcerpt: IndiGen program was initiated by CSIR.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching the initiative with its nodal agency.

claimText: The One Day One Genome Initiative was launched by the Department of Biotechnology (DBT).
evidenceExcerpt: One Day One Genome Initiative was initiated by DBT.
examUse: Correct-pair question matching the initiative with its nodal agency.
distractorHooks: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR)
Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

claimText: The International HapMap Project analyzes genetic variants across African, Asian, and European ancestry groups.
evidenceExcerpt: International HapMap Project analyzes variants in African, Asian, and European ancestry groups.
examUse: Statement-based question on the scope of international genetic projects.
distractorHooks: Maps only plant and agricultural genomes
